ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the organization */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the organization */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "technical_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical contact for the organization */,
  "funding_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding contact for the organization */,
  "technical_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the technical contact */,
  "funding_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the funding contact */,
  "technical_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the technical contact */,
  "funding_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the funding contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commitments" (
  "commitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commitment */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization making the commitment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the commitment */,
  "commitment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the commitment */,
  "commitment_description" TEXT /* Description of the commitment */,
  "commitment_date" TEXT /* Date when the commitment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the commitment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the commitment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the commitment was last updated */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the commitment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the commitment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitments_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES commitment_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitments_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., technical, funding) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commitment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, approved, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commitment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "commitment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commitment */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the commitment */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the commitment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitment_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitment_history_new_status FOREIGN KEY ("new_status") REFERENCES commitment_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitment_history_commitment_id FOREIGN KEY ("commitment_id") REFERENCES commitments ("commitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitment_history_old_status FOREIGN KEY ("old_status") REFERENCES commitment_statuses ("status_name")
)
